content.en:
"Wanfa True Ancestor, are you sure it was the Liuli Sect that did it?"

The Moon Shooting True Ancestor was a little incredulous.

The Liuli Sect is a five-heaven force, and the Void Heaven has nothing to do with the Void Glass Sect, why did the Glass Sect assassinate the true ancestor of the Void Heaven Temple?

He couldn't figure it out, so he didn't quite believe Ye Tian's statement.

"Look!"

Ye Tian took out the relics of the three true ancestors, among which there were the inheritance of the Liuli Sect's exercises and many things.

"I killed three True Ancestors, this is their thing, and the geniuses and strong men of our human race have been arrested, and the other party led me out of the Void Heaven True Country, obviously to intercept and kill me! The other party is a member of the Liuli Sect, and I have nothing to do with the Liuli Sect. Obviously, it was the Liuli Sect that attacked our Void Heaven Pulse and continued to assassinate us, and this time the target was aimed at me! If the True Ancestor of the Moon Shooting doesn't believe it, he can go and investigate!"

Ye Tian said.

At this time, the Moon Shooting True Ancestor had already believed Ye Tian's statement, and he immediately frowned a little.

If it was an ordinary force, he would have led a large number of True Ancestors to kill them a long time ago.

But the Liuli Sect is different, it is the old top five-heaven force.

Although the Dao Ancestor of the Liuli Sect cannot be born at present, the Dao Ancestor of the Void Heaven cannot descend to the Xuanxu Ancient Realm!

In terms of the True Ancestor level alone, the Void Heaven Pulse is not the opponent of the Liuli Sect at all.

"Let me ask the Dao Ancestors!"

Shooting the Moon True Ancestor Dao.

"Hmm!"

Ye Tian nodded, this is the only way for now.

He is not stupid, he will not persuade the True Ancestor of Shooting Moon to lead the True Ancestor to enter the Liuli Sect, the consequences are too serious, even if he can severely damage the Liuli Sect, the foundation of the Void Heaven One Vein in the Xuanxu Ancient Realm will be gone.

It didn't take long for the Dao Ancestors of the Void Heaven One Pulse to send back a message, asking the True Ancestors of the Void Heaven True Kingdom to stand by for the time being, and asking the other True Ancestors to return to the Void Heaven True Kingdom as soon as possible.

For this kind of result, Ye Tian had already expected it.

There is no way, unless the Void Heaven One Vein can find an alliance with the Six or Seven Heavens forces, but it is only the Void Heaven One Vein of the Four Heavens Forces, and people will only make the Void Heaven One Pulse submit, not an alliance.

But the Void Heaven Pulse is naturally unwilling to surrender to other forces casually, the Black Wind Mountain that Ye Tian joined is a good place to go, but the Black Wind Mountain is very strange, it does not accept any subsidiary forces, but it is willing to accept members of other forces.

Therefore, it is said that the Black Wind Mountain is a loose organization.

But I have to admit that Black Wind Mountain is indeed awesome, and it doesn't need affiliated forces.

Moreover, in the past, the way of cultivating geniuses in Black Wind Mountain was very domineering, that is, part of it was cultivated by itself, and part of it was directly plundered.

There was no movement in the Void Heaven True Kingdom, and there was no movement in the Liuli Sect, and the two seemed to have fallen into a special state of confrontation.

......

Void Heaven.

A group of Dao Ancestors were in a meeting.

"I found out, it was the Dark God Temple that took refuge in the Liuli Sect, which led the Liuli Sect to deal with our Void Heaven line!" said a Dao Ancestor.

"Strange, how can the people of the Dark God Temple say that the Liuli Sect can deal with our Void Heaven lineage, judging from the current situation, the Dao Ancestors of the Liuli Sect have not woken up, just those True Ancestors, I'm afraid it will be difficult to destroy the Void Heaven True Kingdom of the Xuanxu Ancient Realm, why should they help the Dark God Temple! With the strength of the Liuli Sect, they don't have to care about a single Dark God Temple, right?"

"Maybe the Dark God Temple paid some price to let the Liuli Sect make a move! In short, the Liuli Sect has already made a move, what should I do next? It's not a way to be on call all the time, once the Liuli Sect can't bear it, I'm afraid it's a decisive battle!"

"Isn't the true ancestor of the Ten Thousand Laws the peak master of the Black Wind Mountain, can you please move the Black Wind Mountain to make a move? If the Black Wind Mountain makes a move, the Mere Liuli Sect is nothing!"

Many Dao Ancestors looked at the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, Ye Tian was the personal disciple of the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, and only the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor could say that Ye Tian could be moved.

"I'm afraid not, Black Wind Mountain probably won't listen to the orders of a mere peak master. Moreover, at this sensitive period, how could Black Wind Mountain deal with forces that also belonged to the Divine Heaven Realm?"

Void Heaven Dao Ancestor said lightly.

But under the persuasion of many Dao Ancestors, the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor still summoned Ye Tian and asked him to give it a try.

This way.

After Ye Tian received the summons from the Void Heaven Dao Ancestor, he contacted the Dragon Power Peak Lord and conveyed his desire to invite Black Wind Mountain to take action.

However, the Dragon Power Peak Lord refused on the spot.

"Lord of the Nine Poles Peak, although Black Wind Mountain is a loose organization, there are some things that have strict rules. After all, many people in the Black Wind Mountain have other identities! Unless there is a force that wants to deal with the Black Wind Mountain, the Black Wind Mountain will definitely not take action easily! Of course, if the Ten Kings give an order, we will definitely do it! Otherwise, you can only mobilize the power under your own command!"

Lord Long Li Feng explained.

"Lord Longli Peak, I understand!"

Ye Tian sighed.

Suddenly, the Dragon Power Peak Lord said again: "Nine Extremes Peak Lord, although you can't ask the Black Wind Mountain to help you deal with the Liuli Sect, but you can use the many treasures of the Black Wind Mountain to improve your strength, as long as your own strength is enough, then you don't need to be afraid of the Liuli Sect!"

"That's right, Black Wind Mountain is at least an Eightfold Heaven force, and among such a force, it is definitely easy to improve my strength!"

Ye Tian suddenly realized.

This is not to blame him, the main thing is that he has not substituted himself into the identity of the peak master of Black Wind Mountain, otherwise he would have used Black Wind Mountain to improve his strength a long time ago.

Subsequently, Ye Tian learned about some situations that he hadn't paid attention to before.

For example, Black Wind Mountain mainly trades with points, and points can be purchased with resources, but this is not cost-effective, and another way is to take the task.

However, the Ten Kings were asleep, and the Heavenly Kings did not wake up, and there were almost no missions posted.

Therefore, those True Ancestors, Peak Masters, and Generals of Black Wind Mountain still used the points they had saved before.

As a new peak master, Ye Tian is indeed difficult to obtain points by doing tasks at present, and can only exchange resources for points.

So, Ye Tian took out a lot of resources and some precious things, which were exchanged for 100,000 points.

So many points were enough for him to cultivate for a long time!

Through the Dragon Power Peak Lord, Ye Tian knew that many of the treasure lands in the Black Wind Mountain had been destroyed, and only a few treasure lands remained, one of which was called Purple Lake.

Purple Lake is a normal treasure land, which can accelerate the cultivation of the power of the True Ancestor, and it has an amplification effect on all kinds of cultivation, although it is not as good as the increase recorded by the Ancient Realm, but it can be superimposed with the increase recorded by the Ancient Realm.

If you cultivate in Purple Lake, one hundred years is a point, and if you use time to accelerate your cultivation, it will be calculated based on the time within the time acceleration.

As a result, no one can afford to take shortcuts.

Ye Tian soon came to the Purple Lake, looking at the endless, pure purple lake, he jumped into it at once and began to cultivate.

As soon as he cultivated, Ye Tian found that the speed at which he was running the Nine Extremes True Technique was far faster than usual, the power of the True Ancestor was growing rapidly, and his cultivation was progressing at an incredible speed.

"Very good, at this speed, accelerate the time to accelerate, or it won't be long before I can cultivate to a great progress!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

He arranged a large array to maintain a 10,000-fold time acceleration, one year in the outside and 10,000 years in the interior.

In this way, in the blink of an eye, a hundred years have passed in the outside world, and Ye Tian has been cultivating for a whole million years.

Millions of years of penance cost him 10,000 points!

For other peak masters, 10,000 points is probably their entire net worth, and Ye Tian used it up in a short time, this behavior is enough to be called a loser.

After spending 10,000 points, Ye Tian's progress was naturally great.

At this moment, Ye Tian's True Ancestor's strength was at least hundreds of times stronger than it was at the beginning, and his cultivation had officially stepped into the middle realm of the Great Dao.

At the same time, Ye Tian's forbidden body finally stepped into the realm in one fell swoop.

That is, his forbidden body has entered.

"Forbidden Body!"

As soon as Ye Tian urged, his body was filled with the power of dark taboos, the whole person was covered with taboo rules, the terrifying aura was permeated, and the rules of the Great Dao were far away, and he didn't dare to approach Ye Tian at all.

At this moment, Ye Tian seems to be the master of all the rules, above the rules.

And after urging the forbidden body, Ye Tian's strength has been terrifyingly increased.

"With the cultivation in the middle of the Great Dao, coupled with a forbidden body, my current combat power may have reached the threshold of the Supreme True Ancestor, and I can be regarded as a weaker Supreme True Ancestor!"

Ye Tian estimated.
